text:
ByOscar Hartzog

If you purchase an independently reviewed product or service through a link on our website, Rolling Stone may receive an affiliate commission.

Today, the USA Men’sBasketballNational Team is on to their second game in the2024 Paris Olympics— this time taking on South Sudan in a highly-anticipated Group C matchup.

The men’s national team has dominated Olympicbasketballfor decades, winning gold in all four of the most recent Olympic games. And that’s why fans were shocked when South Sudan nearly beat the Goliathan team in a pre-Olympic game on July 20, which ended with a score of USA 101, South Sudan 100. In today’s rematch, South Sudan will be certainly be feeling energized, while Steve Kerr’s squad also knows that they must bring their A-game.

In their first games of the tournament, Team USA beat Serbia 110-84, and South Sudan beat Puerto Rico 90-79.

If you’re figuring out how to watch USA vs. South Sudan, read on. Below, we’ve put together a brief guide on where tolivestreamUSA vs. South Sudan online, plus a way to watch USA vs. South Sudan for free without cable.

The USA vs. South SudanOlympicsbasketball game is airing live on USA Network, so tune in there if you’re watching with cable or satellite. If you’ve cut the cord, you can livestream USA vs. South Sudan online usingPeacockor any live TV streaming service that carries USA Network;DirecTV Stream,Hulu + Live TV, andfuboare all good options. Here’s pricing and free trial information for all of these services:

Peacockcosts just $7.99 a month and gets you livestreams of every Olympics event — including the USA vs. South Sudan basketball game. Unfortunately, however, there’s no free trial.



Peacock offers both live and on-demand content, including sports like WWE, Golf, and Olympics, and series likeThe OfficeandYellowstone. Subscriptions start at $7.99 a month.

Cable streaming services are a good alternative to Peacock if you want a free trial. We likeDirecTV Stream, which starts with afive-day free trialand carries USA Network for a Team USA vs. South Sudan livestream.



DirecTV Stream is one of the most comprehensive live TV streaming services with up to 160+ channels, including local channels, regional sports networks, and all popular national channels. Packages start at $79.99 a month and all subscriptions start with a five-day free trial.

Another cable streaming service that’s great for watching USA vs. South Sudan isHulu + Live TV, which offers athree-day free trialto start.



Hulu + Live TV bundles together Hulu’s on-demand library and over 95 live TV channels, including local channels and almost all popular national channels. Subscriptions also include ESPN+ and Disney+ at no additional cost. Hulu + Live TV costs $76.99 a month after a three-day free trial.

fubois another option for streaming USA vs. South Sudan with USA Network in all of its packages. You get a generousseven-day free trialto start.



fubo’s massive streaming plans carry up to 275+ channels, and you can get even more depending on your location. Packages start at $79.99 a month, and you get seven days to try the service for free.

If you’re looking for a free Team USA vs. South Sudan livestream, be sure to take advantage of a free trial fromDirecTV Stream,fubo, orHulu + Live TV. All of these free trials will let you watch the Olympic basketball game online for free, as long as you cancel the trial before it ends.

The Team USA vs. South Sudan Olympics basketball game is happening on Wednesday, July 31. The game starts at 3 p.m. ET/noon PT.

Here are the other upcoming Team USA men’s basketball games — use the same streaming services above to watch these (times in ET):

Group StageJuly 28: USA 110, Serbia 84July 31: USA vs. South Sudan at 3 p.m. ET on USA NetworkAug. 3: USA vs. Puerto Rico at 11:15 a.m. ET on NBC

QuarterfinalsAug. 6: TBD vs. TBD

SemifinalsAug. 8: TBD vs. TBD

Medal GamesAug. 10: TBD vs. TBD

title: How to Watch USA vs. South Sudan Men’s Olympics Basketball Game Online
author: Oscar Hartzog
description: Here’s how to watch the USA vs. South Sudan men’s basketball game online in the 2024 Olympics, plus how to get a free USA vs. South Sudan livestream.
